hero.subtitle: Let Blue Fox AI trading robots grow your capital. Deposit, rent a robot, and earn a monthly return paid to your wallet — withdraw anytime in crypto, bank transfer or cash.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your client portal.
auth.regFeeNote: registration fee. Takes about a minute.

dashboard.depositFundsDesc: Top up your wallet via crypto or bank.
dashboard.rentARobotDesc: Choose a package and start earning.
dashboard.withdrawDesc: Cash out via crypto, bank or cash.
dashboard.kycPendingDesc: We're reviewing your documents — withdrawals unlock once approved.
dashboard.kycVerifyDesc: Required to enable withdrawals. It only takes a minute.
dashboard.noRobotsYet: You haven't rented a robot yet.
dashboard.name: Name

deposit.title: Deposit funds
deposit.subtitle: Top up your wallet. Deposits are credited after our team confirms them.
deposit.sharedAfterRequest: Will be shared by our team after you submit a request.
deposit.referenceHint: Always include your transaction reference so we can match your payment quickly.
deposit.formSubtitle: Submit a request, then send the funds. We credit your wallet after confirming.
deposit.successMessage: Deposit request submitted! It will show as “pending” until our team confirms it.

withdraw.title: Withdraw funds
withdraw.pendingHelp: Your documents are being reviewed. Withdrawals unlock once you're approved (usually 24–48h).
withdraw.verifyHelp: To protect your funds, withdrawals require a verified identity. It only takes a minute.
withdraw.bankPlaceholder: Account name, number, IBAN/IFSC, bank name
withdraw.cashPlaceholder: City / area for cash pickup + your contact number
withdraw.formSubtitle: Funds are held as soon as you request, then released once our team approves.
withdraw.successMessage: Withdrawal requested! It is now pending approval.

invest.title: Rent a robot
invest.subtitle: Pick a package — the deposit is locked into the contract and pays a fixed monthly return.
invest.emptyWallet: Your wallet is empty. Add funds first, then rent a robot.
invest.highestPackagePrefix: Your highest package so far is
invest.highestPackageSuffix: You can only rent a higher package — the same or lower ones aren't available.

kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.subtitle: Verify once to enable withdrawals from your wallet.
kyc.hubMsg_none: Verify your identity to unlock withdrawals.
kyc.hubMsg_pending: We're reviewing your documents, usually within 24–48 hours.
kyc.hubMsg_approved: Your identity is verified. Withdrawals are enabled.
kyc.hubMsg_rejected: Your submission was not approved. Please review the reason and re-submit.
kyc.fileFormats: JPG, PNG, HEIC or PDF · max
kyc.slotPassportHint: The page with your photo & details
kyc.slotSelfieHint: A clear photo of you holding the document
kyc.unsupportedType: Unsupported type. Use JPG, PNG, HEIC or PDF.
kyc.confirmDocsYours: Please confirm the documents are yours.
kyc.reviewWithinHours: We'll review your verification, usually within 24–48 hours.
kyc.uploadIdAndSelfie: Upload a government ID and a selfie. Required to enable withdrawals.
kyc.privacyNote: Your documents are stored securely and only used to verify your identity.
kyc.consentLabel: I confirm these documents are mine and the details are accurate.

referrals.title: Refer & earn
referrals.introBefore: Share your link. When someone you refer rents a robot, you earn
referrals.introAfter: of their deposit — credited straight to your wallet.
referrals.inviteSubtitle: They get started in a minute; you earn on every robot they rent.
referrals.emptyState: No referrals yet. Share your link to get started.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Every movement in your wallet, newest first.
transactions.empty: No transactions yet. They’ll appear here once you deposit or earn.

account.title: Account settings
account.subtitle: Manage your details and security.
account.name: Name
account.profileSubtitle: Keep your contact details up to date.
